mapper.select: SELECT TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO AS id , TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS planNo , TO_CHAR(TI.ITINERARY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS itineraryDt , TI.ITINERARY_TIME AS time , TI.ITINERARY_NM AS title , TI.ITINERARY_MEMO AS content , TI.CONTENT_NO AS contentNo , C.TITLE AS contentName , C.FIRSTIMAGE AS contentImage , NVL(IE.EXPENSE_AMT, 0) AS cost , NVL(IE.ESTIMATED_AMT, 0) AS estimatedCost , IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_NM AS costCategory , IE.PAYMENT_METHOD AS paymentMethod , IE.EXPENSE_MEMO AS expenseMemo FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY TI LEFT JOIN ITINERARY_EXPENSE IE ON IE.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO LEFT JOIN ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE IET ON IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_CD = IE.ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE LEFT JOIN CONTENT C ON C.CONTENTID = TI.CONTENT_NO WHERE TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY_DEL D WHERE D.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO ) ORDER BY TI.ITINERARY_DT ASC, TI.ITINERARY_TIME ASC

SELECT TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO AS id , TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS planNo , TO_CHAR(TI.ITINERARY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS itineraryDt , TI.ITINERARY_TIME AS time , TI.ITINERARY_NM AS title , TI.ITINERARY_MEMO AS content , TI.CONTENT_NO AS contentNo , C.TITLE AS contentName , C.FIRSTIMAGE AS contentImage , NVL(IE.EXPENSE_AMT, 0) AS cost , NVL(IE.ESTIMATED_AMT, 0) AS estimatedCost , IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_NM AS costCategory , IE.PAYMENT_METHOD AS paymentMethod , IE.EXPENSE_MEMO AS expenseMemo FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY TI LEFT JOIN ITINERARY_EXPENSE IE ON IE.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO LEFT JOIN ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE IET ON IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_CD = IE.ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE LEFT JOIN CONTENT C ON C.CONTENTID = TI.CONTENT_NO WHERE TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = #{no} AND TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY_DEL D WHERE D.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ITINERARY_EXPENSE (ITINERARY_EXPENSE_NO, TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO, EXPENSE_AMT, ESTIMATED_AMT, ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE, PAYMENT_METHOD, EXPENSE_MEMO) VALUES (ITINERARY_EXPENSE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itineraryNo}, #{amount}, #{estimatedAmt}, NVL( (SELECT MIN(EXPENSE_TYPE_CD) FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE WHERE EXPENSE_TYPE_NM = #{typeName}), (SELECT MIN(EXPENSE_TYPE_CD) FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE WHERE EXPENSE_TYPE_NM = '기타') ), #{paymentMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expenseMemo, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_NM AS category , SUM(IE.EXPENSE_AMT) AS total , SUM(NVL(IE.ESTIMATED_AMT, 0)) AS estimatedTotal FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE IE JOIN ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE IET ON IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_CD = IE.ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE JOIN TRAVEL_ITINERARY TI ON TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = IE.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO WHERE TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} GROUP BY IET.EXPENSE_TYPE_NM ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT NVL(SUM(IE.EXPENSE_AMT), 0) FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE IE JOIN TRAVEL_ITINERARY TI ON TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = IE.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO WHERE TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo}
SELECT NVL(SUM(IE.ESTIMATED_AMT), 0) FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE IE JOIN TRAVEL_ITINERARY TI ON TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = IE.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO WHERE TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo}
SELECT EXPENSE_TYPE_NM FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE_TYPE ORDER BY EXPENSE_TYPE_CD ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAVEL_ITINERARY_DEL (ITINERARY_DEL_NO, TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO, DEL_DT, DELETER_GUEST_NO) VALUES (TRAVEL_ITINERARY_DEL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itineraryNo}, SYSDATE, #{deleterGuestNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC})

INSERT INTO TRAVEL_ITINERARY_HIST (ITINERARY_HIST_NO, TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO, ACTION_TYPE_CD, PLAN_GUEST_NO, ITINERARY_NM) VALUES (TRAVEL_ITINERARY_HIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itineraryNo}, (SELECT ACTION_TYPE_CD FROM ACTION_TYPE WHERE ACTION_TYPE_NM = #{actionTypeNm}), #{planGuestNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{target})
mapper.select: SELECT AT.ACTION_TYPE_NM AS type , TH.ITINERARY_NM AS target , MA.NICKNAME AS editor , TO_CHAR(TH.EDIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS editedAt FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY_HIST TH JOIN TRAVEL_ITINERARY TI ON TI.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO = TH.TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO JOIN ACTION_TYPE AT ON AT.ACTION_TYPE_CD = TH.ACTION_TYPE_CD JOIN PLAN_GUEST PG ON PG.PLAN_GUEST_NO = TH.PLAN_GUEST_NO JOIN MEMBER_ACTIVE MA ON MA.MEMBER_NO = PG.MEMBER_NO WHERE TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} ORDER BY TH.EDIT_DT DESC
SELECT TO_CHAR(TRAVEL_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDt , TO_CHAR(TRAVEL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDt FROM TRAVEL_PLAN WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo}
SELECT ACTION_TYPE_CD AS actionTypeCd , ACTION_TYPE_NM AS actionTypeNm FROM ACTION_TYPE ORDER BY ACTION_TYPE_CD ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ACTION_TYPE SET ACTION_TYPE_NM = #{nm} WHERE ACTION_TYPE_CD = #{cd}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACTION_TYPE WHERE ACTION_TYPE_CD = #{cd}
